REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,000.00 FOR TRANSACTION (), PAYABLE TO NORMAN TURNER, WARRANT #38207535, DATED OCT-19-2023

LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF NORMAN TURNER'S MOTION TO DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND PLAINTIFFS INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE" IS GRANTED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Class Claims Without Prejudice And Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF NORMAN TURNER's Motion To Dismiss Class Claims Without Prejudice And Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss class claims without prejudice and plaintiff's individual claims with prejudice" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
